Event: Magic Well - September 2024
Event Date: 08/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR236


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Titled Knight Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit enhances own physical armor by 50% for 4 sec. When the armor enhancement wears off, the armor wearer gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 300% of the unit's physical armor. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 3 sec.
Also, during this time, all enemies take physical damage equal to 200% of the unit's physical armor.

Requirements: 98-100
